Thank you! I wasn't expecting the cleaning until today but it was cleaned yesterday Instead! I hope with no added stress to the Maintenance man! The patio looks great! Its been so long since Ive been able to use my space, i cant wait to enjoy it!

narrative.intro: The month just started and we still don't have the complete metrics for this period. Instead of reporting on the KPIs, this update covers team performance, areas for improvement, and operational workflow.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: We are currently reinforcing purchase requirements, approval processes, and time-entry categorizations. This is essential to ensure correct documentation for work orders and turns.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: This transition has been a major challenge. Technicians were not used to following structured procedures and pushed back against management when asked for results. Initially, the backlog was a constant issue and all of Jonas's KPIs were in red. However, we have successfully cleared the backlog. Jonas has shown willingness to learn, and is now following instructions, adhering to approval workflows, and documenting Melds correctly.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: Jonas expressed a strong desire to join the turn team. After reviewing his performance while assisting Armani, we decided to give him this opportunity. We are currently sourcing and interviewing candidates for a new maintenance team member.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: The grounds in Tacoma continue to be managed by professional landscapers.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: The recurring Melds rely entirely on Jonas to add photos of the completed work and monitor the irrigation systems.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: We will monitor how Jonas's transition to the turn team affects these updates to ensure no gaps in grounds documentation. We are currently looking to onboard a new team member in the maintenance team.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: Following Wade's resignation 10 days ago, I stepped in to support Justin with daily coordination, timely approvals, and fast response times.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: Working closely with Justin has shown me that he is highly accountable. Over the past few days, he has received numerous messages from residents via Property Meld thanking him for his dedication and quick resolution of their issues.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: To improve completion times, I automated Spokane's scheduling by property to reduce travel time between locations, allowing us to handle more daily work orders. The AI scheduler is also configured to prioritize emergencies. Additionally, we are actively looking to onboard a new team member.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: Grounds maintenance successfully remains with David and Alexander.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: Both guys have quickly adapted to our documentation processes, they complete consistent time entries, request necessary approvals, and keep up-to-date with lawn care and irrigation across all properties.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: We will continue monitoring their reporting consistency to maintain these great standards.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: This team is overseen by Isaac, who maintains professional communication and effectively coordinates repairs and escalations.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: Both Jaxson and Jared remain highly accountable despite heavy workloads. Jared acts as our dedicated pool attendant, taking full ownership of cleaning, safety compliance, and licensing. Jaxson is a fast, multitasking technician who is very transparent and consistently provides the necessary context to complete work orders in time.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: I am currently implementing automated property-based scheduling here to help the team complete more work orders per day. Organizing this workload is essential since they receive between 6 and 10 Melds daily.

bullets.label: Operations Review
bullets.text: Hannah's compliance with our procedures is excellent. Reynaldo and I worked closely on the documentation process over the last couple of weeks.

bullets.label: Performance Update
bullets.text: Reynaldo has successfully adapted to the new system and is executing the documentation process well. We are still working on the communication process and accountability to keep the lawns and irrigation systems up to date.

bullets.label: Future Improvements
bullets.text: Grounds scheduling will also be fully automated within the next few days to maximize efficiency.

priorities_next_week: Onboarding a new team member to the Spokane team
